name: Delaware Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Delaware - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.streetAddress:
Cannon Building, 861 Silver Lake Blvd, Suite 203
Dover, DE 19904
address.description: Cannon Building, 861 Silver Lake Blvd, Suite 203, Dover, DE 19904

renewalCycle: Every 2 years (expires May 31 of odd years) + 30 CE hours

requiredDocuments.name: DELPROS Online Application
requiredDocuments.description: Completed application submitted electronically with the $235 fee.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Official College Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Verification of your accredited degree, usually requested directly through DELPROS processing.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Delaware dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is a $235 application processing fee.

mainEntity.name: When does the Delaware license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delaware dietitian licenses expire biennially on May 31 of odd-numbered years. Renewal fees are determined dynamically based on administrative costs.

mainEntity.name: Does Delaware license Nutritionists distinct from Dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: Delaware uses the combined title of Licensed Dietitian/Nutritionist. Applicants can qualify via either the Registered Dietitian (CDR) pathway or the Certified Nutrition Specialist (CNS) pathway.

mainEntity.name: Does Delaware have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Delaware. To work in Delaware, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Delaware?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 5 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Delaware while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
